revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:September 6 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of September 6 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦9月6日'''は[[旧暦]][[9月 (旧暦)|9月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[宝亀]]元年（[[770年]]_月_日） - [[大隅国]]へ配流されていた[[和気清麻呂]]が、[[称徳天皇]]崩御・[[道鏡]]失脚に伴い都に召還 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[1804年]]_月_日） - [[ロシア]]皇帝[[アレクサンダー1世]]の遣日使節[[レザノフ]]が長崎に来航し通商を要求
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[寛永]]元年（[[1624年]]_月_日） - [[高台院]]（北政所、おね、寧々）、[[豊臣秀吉]]の正室（* [[1548年]]） * [[安政]]5年（[[1858年]][[10月12日]]） - [[歌川広重]]、[[浮世絵師]]（* [[1797年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[9月5日 (旧暦)|9月5日]] 翌日[[9月7日 (旧暦)|9月7日]] - 前月[[8月6日 (旧暦)|8月6日]] 翌月[[10月6日 (旧暦)|10月6日]] *新暦[[9月6日]]
{{msg:stub}}

revision.text:
'''September 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)''' is the DAYX day of month MONTHY of the tradional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
==OVERVIEW== {{Lunar September}} ''September 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)<!--Lunar September6-->きゅうれきくがつむいか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|Lunar September]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]][[Category:友引]]である。

== できごと == * [[宝亀]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[770年]][[9月29日]]） - [[大隅国]]へ配流されていた[[和気清麻呂]]が、[[孝謙天皇|称徳天皇]]崩御・[[道鏡]]失脚に伴い都に召還 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[10月9日]]） - [[ロシア]]皇帝[[アレクサンドル1世 (ロシア皇帝)|アレクサンドル1世]]の遣日使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ|レザノフ]]が長崎に来航し通商を要求

== 忌日 == * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月12日]]） - [[仁田忠常]]、[[武将]]（* [[1168年]]） * [[永正]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1518年]][[10月10日]]） - [[尼子政久]]、[[武将]]（* [[1488年]]([[1494年]]説あり)） * [[寛永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[10月17日]]） - [[高台院]]（北政所、おね、寧々）、[[豊臣秀吉]]の正室（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[10月23日]]） - [[松平吉透]]、[[松江藩]]主（* [[1668年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[10月12日]]） - [[歌川広重]]、[[浮世絵師]]（* [[1797年]]）

--> == Events == * [[宝亀]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[770年]][[9月29日]]） - [[大隅国]]へ配流されていた[[和気清麻呂]]が、[[孝謙天皇|称徳天皇]]崩御・[[道鏡]]失脚に伴い都に召還 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[10月9日]]） - [[ロシア]]皇帝[[アレクサンドル1世 (ロシア皇帝)|アレクサンドル1世]]の遣日使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ|レザノフ]]が長崎に来航し通商を要求
== Births == * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[10月3日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（+ [[1822年]]）
== Deaths == * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月12日]]） - [[仁田忠常]]、[[武将]]（* [[1168年]]） * [[永正]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1518年]][[10月10日]]） - [[尼子政久]]、[[武将]]（* [[1488年]]([[1494年]]説あり)） * [[寛永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[10月17日]]） - [[高台院]]（北政所、おね、寧々）、[[豊臣秀吉]]の正室（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[10月23日]]） - [[松平吉透]]、[[松江藩]]主（* [[1668年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[10月12日]]） - [[歌川広重]]、[[浮世絵師]]（* [[1797年]]）
== Commemorations ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

revision.text:
[[sn:September 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770年}} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}}) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}}, who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}}, is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}}.
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}}, representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシア皇帝)}}, arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births ==
* {{ill|Kansei|ja|寛政}} 3 (Gregorian {{ill|1791|ja|1791年}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}}, 8th {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} lord (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822年}}).
== Deaths ==
* {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 (Julian {{ill|1203|ja|1203年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}}) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}}, samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168年}}).
* {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 (Julian {{ill|1518|ja|1518年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}}) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}}, samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488年}} (or {{ill|1494|ja|1494年}})).

[[sn:September 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}}.
== Events ==
* {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770年}} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}}) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}}, who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}}, is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}}.
* {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}}) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}}, representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシア皇帝)}}, arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.

== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770年}} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシア皇帝)}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791年}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168年}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488年}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494年}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|" to "{{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770年}} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシア皇帝)}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791年}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168年}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488年}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494年}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168年}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488年}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494年}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797年}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .

revision.text:
[[sn:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770年}} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791年}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168年}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488年}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494年}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797年}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791年}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168年}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488年}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494年}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797年}} ).

[[sn:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770年}} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804年}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791年}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822年}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168年}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488年}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494年}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624年}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705年}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797年}} ).== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

[[sn:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770年}} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791st year }} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203rd year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168年}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518年}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488年}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494th year }} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624th year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548年}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668年}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858年}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797年}} ). == See Also ==

[[sn:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770th year }} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791st year }} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203rd year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168th year }} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488th year }} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494th year }} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624th year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858th year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203rd year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168th year }} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488th year }} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494th year }} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624th year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858th year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} ).

[[sn:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770th year }} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791st year }} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203rd year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168th year }} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488th year }} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494th year }} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624th year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858th year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} ).

revision.comment: Text replacement - "Japanese Traditional Lunar Months" to "Japanese Traditional Lunisolar Months"
revision.text:
[[sn:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 9월 6일]] [[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]] [[zh:九月初六]] [[en:draft:September 6 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar September}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|770|ja|770th year }} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804th year }} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791st year }} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year }} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203rd year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168th year }} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518th year }} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488th year }} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494th year }} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624th year }} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year }} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705th year }} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668th year }} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858th year }} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year }} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=draft|12=draft}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常|12=draft|12=draft}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=draft|12=draft}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488th year|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院|12=draft|12=draft}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=draft|12=draft}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=draft|12=draft}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=draft|12=draft}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重|12=draft|12=draft}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki (era)|ja|宝亀|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|770|ja|770th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|September 29|ja|9月29日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|ja|和気清麻呂|12=draft|12=draft}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|ja|大隅国|12=draft|12=draft}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Shōtoku|ja|孝謙天皇|12=draft|12=draft}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|ja|道鏡|12=draft|12=draft}} . * {{ill|Bunka (era)|ja|文化 (元号)|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1804|ja|1804th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 9|ja|10月9日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|ja|ニコライ・レザノフ|12=draft|12=draft}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=draft|12=draft}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1791|ja|1791st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 3|ja|10月3日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=draft|12=draft}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1822|ja|1822nd year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin (era)|ja|建仁|12=draft|12=draft}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1203|ja|1203rd year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|ja|仁田忠常|12=draft|12=draft}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|ja|1168th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|ja|永正|12=draft|12=draft}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1518|ja|1518th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 10|ja|10月10日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=draft|12=draft}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|ja|1488th year|12=draft|12=draft}} or {{ill|1494|ja|1494th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|ja|寛永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1624|ja|1624th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 17|ja|10月17日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|ja|高台院|12=draft|12=draft}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=draft|12=draft}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=draft|12=draft}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|ja|豊臣秀吉|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1548|ja|1548th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|ja|宝永|12=draft|12=draft}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1705|ja|1705th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 23|ja|10月23日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=draft|12=draft}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|ja|松江藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1668|ja|1668th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|ja|安政|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1858|ja|1858th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|October 12|ja|10月12日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Utagawa Hiroshige|ja|歌川広重|12=draft|12=draft}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|ja|1797th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月6日'''（きゅうれきくがつむいか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[宝亀]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[770年]][[9月29日]]） - [[大隅国]]へ配流されていた[[和気清麻呂]]が、[[孝謙天皇|称徳天皇]]崩御・[[道鏡]]失脚に伴い都に召還 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[10月9日]]） - [[ロシア]]皇帝[[アレクサンドル1世 (ロシア皇帝)|アレクサンドル1世]]の遣日使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ|レザノフ]]が長崎に来航し通商を要求
== 誕生日 == * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[10月3日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（+ [[1822年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月12日]]） - [[仁田忠常]]、[[武将]]（* [[1168年]]） * [[永正]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1518年]][[10月10日]]） - [[尼子政久]]、[[武将]]（* [[1488年]]([[1494年]]説あり)） * [[寛永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[10月17日]]） - [[高台院]]（北政所、おね、寧々）、[[豊臣秀吉]]の正室（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[10月23日]]） - [[松平吉透]]、[[松江藩]]主（* [[1668年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[10月12日]]） - [[歌川広重]]、[[浮世絵師]]（* [[1797年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

revision.text:
{{旧暦9月}} '''旧暦9月6日'''（きゅうれきくがつむいか）は[[9月 (旧暦)|旧暦9月]]の6日目である。六曜は[[六曜#友引|友引]]である。
== できごと == * [[宝亀]]元年（[[ユリウス暦]][[770年]][[9月29日]]） - [[大隅国]]へ配流されていた[[和気清麻呂]]が、[[孝謙天皇|称徳天皇]]崩御・[[道鏡]]失脚に伴い都に召還 * [[文化 (元号)|文化]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1804年]][[10月9日]]） - [[ロシア]]皇帝[[アレクサンドル1世 (ロシア皇帝)|アレクサンドル1世]]の遣日使節[[ニコライ・レザノフ|レザノフ]]が長崎に来航し通商を要求
== 誕生日 == * [[寛政]]3年（グレゴリオ暦[[1791年]][[10月3日]]） - [[松平斉恒]]、第8代[[松江藩]]主（+ [[1822年]]）
== 忌日 == * [[建仁]]3年（ユリウス暦[[1203年]][[10月12日]]） - [[仁田忠常]]、[[武将]]（* [[1168年]]） * [[永正]]15年（ユリウス暦[[1518年]][[10月10日]]） - [[尼子政久]]、[[武将]]（* [[1488年]]([[1494年]]説あり)） * [[寛永]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1624年]][[10月17日]]） - [[高台院]]（北政所、おね、寧々）、[[豊臣秀吉]]の正室（* [[1548年]]） * [[宝永]]2年（グレゴリオ暦[[1705年]][[10月23日]]） - [[松平吉透]]、[[松江藩]]主（* [[1668年]]） * [[安政]]5年（グレゴリオ暦[[1858年]][[10月12日]]） - [[歌川広重]]、[[浮世絵師]]（* [[1797年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906}}

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|September 6|qq=September 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|qq=}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=}} 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|qq=}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|qq=}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|qq=}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|qq=}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|qq=}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|qq=}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初六|qq=}} {{zh:九月初六|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初六|qq=}} {{zh:九月初六|qq=}} {{cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}} {{zh-yue:九月初六|qq=}} {{zh:九月初六|qq=}} ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}
[[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:九月初六]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|qq=}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.

{{Not to be confused with|September 6|qq=September 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|ja|友引|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|qq=}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|qq=}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|qq=}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|qq=}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).
== See Also ==

{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[d:Q840351]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 6|qq=September 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|qid=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * {{ill|Kansei|ja|Kansei|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|qq=|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|qq=|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|qq=|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|qq=|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|qq=draft|qq=draft|qq=|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|qq=|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of == Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初六]][[zh:九月初六]]
{{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840351]]
Wikidata name: 6th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar
[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Not to be confused with|September 6|qq=September 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}}
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}}
{{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}}
{{Lunisolar September|qq=}} 
'''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}  the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

== Events ==
* [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]]  1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:770|770]]  [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]]  and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] .
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]]  1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.

== Births ==
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}  3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1791|1791]]  [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]]  (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]]  3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1203|1203]]  [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]]  15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1518|1518]]  [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]]  or [[:en:1494|1494]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]]  1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1624|1624]]  [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]]  (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]  (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ).
* [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]]  2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1705|1705]]  [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]]  (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]]  5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1858|1858]]  [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).

== See Also ==

{{Lunar Calendar See Also|9|5|9|7|8|6|10|9|0906|qq=}} 
   {{cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} 
    {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}}  {{zh-yue:九月初六|qq=}}  {{zh:九月初六|qq=}}   
   {{cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} 
    {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}}  {{zh-yue:九月初六|qq=}}  {{zh:九月初六|qq=}}   
     {{cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)|qq=}} 
    {{zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)|qq=}}  {{zh-yue:九月初六|qq=}}  {{zh:九月初六|qq=}}   
==Notes==

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初六]][[zh:九月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840351]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 6|qq=September 6}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).
== See Also ==

== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).
== See Also ==

Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).
== See Also ==
