Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:770|770]] [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]] and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] . * [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1804|1804]] [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1791|1791]] [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).
== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).
== See Also ==

'''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}  the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

== Events ==
* [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]]  1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:770|770]]  [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]]  and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] .
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]]  1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.

== Births ==
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}  3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1791|1791]]  [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]]  (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]]  3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1203|1203]]  [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]]  15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1518|1518]]  [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]]  or [[:en:1494|1494]] ).

* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]]  5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1858|1858]]  [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).

{{Lunisolar September|qq=}} 
'''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}}  the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}}  day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .

== Events ==
* [[:en:Hōki|Hōki (era)]]  1 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:770|770]]  [[:en:September 29|September 29]] ) – [[:en:Wake no Kiyomaro|Wake no Kiyomaro]] , who had been exiled to [[:en:Ōsumi Province|Ōsumi Province]] , is recalled to the capital following the death of [[:en:Empress Kōken|Empress Shōtoku]]  and the downfall of [[:en:Dōkyō|Dōkyō]] .
* [[:en:Bunka|Bunka (era)]]  1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1804|1804]]  [[:en:October 9|October 9]] ) – Russian envoy [[:en:Nikolai Rezanov|Nikolai Rezanov]] , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.

== Births ==
* [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}  3 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1791|1791]]  [[:en:October 3|October 3]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]]  (+ [[:en:1822|1822]] ).

== Deaths ==
* [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]]  3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1203|1203]]  [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ).
* [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]]  15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]]  [[:en:1518|1518]]  [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]]  or [[:en:1494|1494]] ).
* [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]]  1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1624|1624]]  [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]]  (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]]  (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ).
* [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]]  2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1705|1705]]  [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]]  (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ).
* [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]]  5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]]  [[:en:1858|1858]]  [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).

== Deaths == * [[:en:Kennin|Kennin (era)]] 3 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1203|1203]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Nitta Tadatsune|Nitta Tadatsune]] , a samurai general (* [[:en:1168|1168]] ). * [[:en:Eishō (Muromachi period)|Eishō (Muromachi period)]] 15 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1518|1518]] [[:en:October 10|October 10]] ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* [[:en:1488|1488]] or [[:en:1494|1494]] ). * [[:en:Kan'ei|Kan'ei]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1624|1624]] [[:en:October 17|October 17]] ) – [[:en:Kōdai-in|Kōdai-in]] (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of [[:en:Toyotomi Hideyoshi|Toyotomi Hideyoshi]] (* [[:en:1548|1548]] ). * [[:en:Hōei|Hōei]] 2 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1705|1705]] [[:en:October 23|October 23]] ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the [[:en:Matsue Domain|Matsue Domain]] (* [[:en:1668|1668]] ). * [[:en:Ansei|Ansei]] 5 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1858|1858]] [[:en:October 12|October 12]] ) – [[:en:Hiroshige|Utagawa Hiroshige]] , a ukiyo‐e painter (* [[:en:1797|1797]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初六]][[zh:九月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初六]][[zh:九月初六]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:9 nguŏk 6 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:9月6日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 9월 6일]][[zh-min-nan:9 goe̍h 6 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:九月初六]][[zh:九月初六]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840351]] Wikidata name: 6th day of the 9th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:14, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|September 6|qq=September 6}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:17, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki (era)}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|770|en|770|WD=Q25021|lt=770}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|WD=Q2882|lt=September 29}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|en|Wake no Kiyomaro|WD=Q7961005|lt=Wake no Kiyomaro}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|en|Ōsumi Province|WD=Q981002|lt=Ōsumi Province}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Shōtoku}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|WD=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō}} . * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|WD=Q6894|lt=1804}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|en|Nikolai Rezanov|WD=Q332732|lt=Nikolai Rezanov}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1791|en|1791|WD=Q7784|lt=1791}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|en|Matsue Domain|WD=Q1017072|lt=Matsue Domain}} (+ {{ill|1822|en|1822|WD=Q6983|lt=1822}} ).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Kennin|en|Kennin|WD=Q1195433|lt=Kennin (era)}} 3 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1203|en|1203|WD=Q5227|lt=1203}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|en|Nitta Tadatsune|WD=Q11376431|lt=Nitta Tadatsune}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|en|1168|WD=Q19679|lt=1168}} ). * {{ill|Eishō (Muromachi period)|en|Eishō (Muromachi period)|WD=Q1193577|lt=Eishō (Muromachi period)}} 15 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1518|en|1518|WD=Q6268|lt=1518}} {{ill|October 10|en|October 10|WD=Q2921|lt=October 10}} ) – {{ill|Amago Masahisa|ja|尼子政久|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amago Masahisa|1=Amago Masahisa|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11464918}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1488|en|1488|WD=Q4853|lt=1488}} or {{ill|1494|en|1494|WD=Q6693|lt=1494}} ). * {{ill|Kan'ei|en|Kan'ei|WD=Q1192913|lt=Kan'ei}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1624|en|1624|WD=Q6821|lt=1624}} {{ill|October 17|en|October 17|WD=Q2962|lt=October 17}} ) – {{ill|Kōdai-in|en|Kōdai-in|WD=Q1146603|lt=Kōdai-in}} (also known as {{ill|Kita no Mandokoro|ja|北政所|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kita no Mandokoro|1=kita no mandokoro|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11401757}} , {{ill|One (Toyotomi)|ja|おね|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/One (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} , or {{ill|Nene (Toyotomi)|ja|寧々|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Nene (Toyotomi)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 高台院|1=Nene|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146603}} ), wife of {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|WD=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (* {{ill|1548|en|1548|WD=Q6551|lt=1548}} ). * {{ill|Hōei|en|Hōei|WD=Q1145262|lt=Hōei}} 2 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1705|en|1705|WD=Q6830|lt=1705}} {{ill|October 23|en|October 23|WD=Q2958|lt=October 23}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|ja|松平吉透|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Yoshiyuki|1=Matsudaira Yoshitoo|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530383}} , lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|en|Matsue Domain|WD=Q1017072|lt=Matsue Domain}} (* {{ill|1668|en|1668|WD=Q7595|lt=1668}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1858|en|1858|WD=Q7684|lt=1858}} {{ill|October 12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}} ) – {{ill|Hiroshige|en|Hiroshige|WD=Q200798|lt=Utagawa Hiroshige}} , a ukiyo‐e painter (* {{ill|1797|en|1797|WD=Q7820|lt=1797}} ).
== See Also ==

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki (era)}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|770|en|770|WD=Q25021|lt=770}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|WD=Q2882|lt=September 29}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|en|Wake no Kiyomaro|WD=Q7961005|lt=Wake no Kiyomaro}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|en|Ōsumi Province|WD=Q981002|lt=Ōsumi Province}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Shōtoku}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|WD=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō}} . * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|WD=Q6894|lt=1804}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|en|Nikolai Rezanov|WD=Q332732|lt=Nikolai Rezanov}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
== Births == * [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 3 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1791|en|1791|WD=Q7784|lt=1791}} {{ill|October 3|en|October 3|WD=Q2931|lt=October 3}} ) – {{ill|Matsudaira Naritsune|ja|松平斉恒|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Matsudaira Naritsune|1=Matsudaira Naritsune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11530461}} , 8th lord of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|en|Matsue Domain|WD=Q1017072|lt=Matsue Domain}} (+ {{ill|1822|en|1822|WD=Q6983|lt=1822}} ).

12|en|October 12|WD=Q2920|lt=October 12}} ) – {{ill|Nitta Tadatsune|en|Nitta Tadatsune|WD=Q11376431|lt=Nitta Tadatsune}} , a samurai general (* {{ill|1168|en|1168|WD=Q19679|lt=1168}} ). * {{ill|Eishō of the {{ill|Matsue Domain|en|Matsue Domain|WD=Q1017072|lt=Matsue Domain}} (* {{ill|1668|en|1668|WD=Q7595|lt=1668}} ). * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|WD=Q1327259|lt=Ansei}} 5 ({{ill|Gregorian == Events == * {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki (era)|1=Hōki}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|770|en|770|WD=Q25021|lt=770|1=770}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|WD=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|en|Wake no Kiyomaro|WD=Q7961005|lt=Wake no Kiyomaro|1=Wake no Kiyomaro}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|en|Ōsumi Province|WD=Q981002|lt=Ōsumi Province|1=Ōsumi Province}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Shōtoku|1=Empress Kōken}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|WD=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō|1=Dōkyō}} . * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)|1=Bunka}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|WD=Q6894|lt=1804|1=1804}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|en|Nikolai Rezanov|WD=Q332732|lt=Nikolai Rezanov|1=Nikolai Rezanov}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=九月初六|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 9월 6일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar September|qq=}} '''September 6''' is the 6th day of month {{ill|September (Lunisolar)|ja|9月 (旧暦)|lt=September (Nagatsuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/September (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 9th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Tomobiki|WD=Q96759840|1=tomobiki}}{{efn|ja|友引|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}}{{efn|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomobiki|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 六曜|1=Rokuyō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q9418169}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Hōki|en|Hōki|WD=Q18520676|lt=Hōki (era)|1=Hōki}} 1 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|770|en|770|WD=Q25021|lt=770|1=770}} {{ill|September 29|en|September 29|WD=Q2882|lt=September 29|1=September 29}} ) – {{ill|Wake no Kiyomaro|en|Wake no Kiyomaro|WD=Q7961005|lt=Wake no Kiyomaro|1=Wake no Kiyomaro}} , who had been exiled to {{ill|Ōsumi Province|en|Ōsumi Province|WD=Q981002|lt=Ōsumi Province|1=Ōsumi Province}} , is recalled to the capital following the death of {{ill|Empress Kōken|en|Empress Kōken|WD=Q232955|lt=Empress Shōtoku|1=Empress Kōken}} and the downfall of {{ill|Dōkyō|en|Dōkyō|WD=Q1272718|lt=Dōkyō|1=Dōkyō}} . * {{ill|Bunka|en|Bunka|WD=Q1373146|lt=Bunka (era)|1=Bunka}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1804|en|1804|WD=Q6894|lt=1804|1=1804}} {{ill|October 9|en|October 9|WD=Q2923|lt=October 9|1=October 9}} ) – Russian envoy {{ill|Nikolai Rezanov|en|Nikolai Rezanov|WD=Q332732|lt=Nikolai Rezanov|1=Nikolai Rezanov}} , representing Emperor {{ill|Alexander I of Russia|ja|アレクサンドル1世 (ロシアEmperor)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Alexander I of Russia|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , arrives in Nagasaki to request trade relations.
